## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- **WeChat version:** [e.g. 3.9.x]
- **Installation method:** [pip install / from source]
- **Screen resolution:** [e.g. 2560×1440]
